title: Fishing Real: Aquaculture 2
description: A datapack adding compatibility between Fishing Real and Aquaculture 2.
body: This is a simple datapack making fish from [Aquaculture 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture) compatible with [Fishing Real](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing-real). You'll be able to get live fish when fishing!
